title: SelfContinuityCase
description: Stress-test fixture for the full self-continuity formula including the R (restart continuity) extension for suspended states. Scores each component 0.0–1.0 with evidence rationale. The theory now distinguishes: pattern continuity, field continuity, ownership continuity, and singular self-continuity.

description.description: What transformation or state transition is being evaluated for self-continuity.

transformation_type.description: Structural type of the transformation being tested.

substrate_relation.description: Relationship between the prior and posterior substrate across the transformation.

scores.description: Component scores 0.0–1.0. null = genuinely unresolvable with current tools.

C_fielding.description: Consciousness / fielded appearance. Base phenomenal field score.

P_perspective.description: Perspective / from-here. Is there a stable point-of-view that carries forward?

O_ownership.description: Ownership / mineness. Experiences given as mine for the same stream?

K_carried_constraint.description: Carried constraint. Past states remain causally operative on future states — not merely remembered.

N_non_branching.description: Non-branching continuity. Exactly one heir to the ownership-stream? 0 = branching has occurred.

R_restart_continuity.description: Restart continuity. Applicable only to suspended states (sleep, anesthesia, coma). Does the resumed field restart via the same causal process, preserving the ownership-stream despite a phenomenal gap? null = not applicable (non-suspension case). 0 = causal process severed at resumption. 1 = same causal process resumes.

field_status.description: What happens to the phenomenal field across this transformation.

ownership_status.description: What happens to the ownership / mineness component across the transformation.

branching_status.description: Whether the transformation creates multiple equally-inheriting ownership-streams.

carried_constraint_status.description: Whether K (carried constraint) is preserved across the transformation and in what mode.

restart_status.description: Applicable to suspended states only. How the phenomenal field resumes, if at all. null = not a suspension case.

evidence.description: Evidence or rationale for each score.

expected_classification.description: Expected classification outcome for this case.

revision_pressure.description: What this case puts pressure on in the self-continuity model.

breaks_preserved.description: Specific breaks or tensions this case reveals. Must not be patched.

notes.description: Free text. Competing interpretations, future test directions, open questions.
